rent.note: furnished 1BR in Vera or Vake nomad area

utilities.note: electric + water + internet (~21 USD for fiber)

diningOut.note: mix of local restaurants and cafes

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly at Terminal or Impact Hub

simData.note: Magti or Geocell SIM with generous data

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Peak tourist months get higher multipliers.

evidence.claim: furnished 1BR in Vera/Vake $400–600/mo; overall nomad budget $800–$1,200/mo
evidence.quote: a furnished one-bedroom apartment in a central neighborhood like Vera or Vake for $400-600, groceries and eating out for $200-350, coworking for $80-150

evidence.claim: coworking monthly: Terminal unlimited flex $145 USD, unlimited fixed $185 USD
evidence.quote: unlimited flex for 145 USD (410 GEL), and unlimited fixed for 185 USD (525 GEL)
Utilities (electricity, water, heating/cooling) average $85/month, and internet runs $21/month for a home connection

evidence.claim: rents climbing 20-30% since 2023 in popular nomad neighborhoods
evidence.quote: Tbilisi is getting more expensive, with rents in popular neighborhoods climbing 20-30% since 2023
